name.full: IT Assistant Voice — Real-time voice over Microsoft Learn

description.short: Ask Microsoft Learn anything, hands-free, in real time.
description.full: Talk to the IT Assistant in real time — Azure AI Foundry Voice Live streams your voice to a Copilot Studio agent grounded on the Microsoft Learn MCP server. Press the mic and speak: the agent answers aloud with barge-in, HD TTS, and semantic VAD. This tab embeds the custom Voice Live web UI hosted on Azure Container Apps.
